data.name: UAX14001_Message
data.value: The Unicode data file '{0}' was not supplied as an AdditionalFiles item. Run reference/build.sh or reference/build.bat to download the Unicode 17.0.0 data.

data.name: UAX14002_Title
data.value: Unicode reference data could not be parsed

data.name: UAX14002_Message
data.value: The Unicode data could not be parsed: {0}
